messages.content: Sam just stepped in with a hello — I'll bring in marketing to set a light frame before we ask what brought them here, so we don't steamroll a first touch.

Sam, thanks for saying hi. Before we pitch anything, I'd like one sentence on what kind of business you're thinking about — even a rough industry helps me avoid generic channel talk. If you're still deciding, that's fine; we can keep this conversational until you have a concrete offer in mind. I'm not going to push a funnel diagram on a greeting; I want the next step to match what you actually need this week, not what a template says you should need.
